prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: JMN-MINISTYLINGHEAD-JASMINE-BUN Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Just Play Existing Title: Just Play 2pc Aladdin Girls Mini Styling Head Jasmine Pretend Play Dress Up Set Description: Is your child a massive fan of the Aladdin movie franchise? This officially licensed by Disney Jasmine styling head set is a perfect gift idea this holiday season. Your child can practice dress-up, pretend play, and hair styling techniques with their favorite Disney princess with a mini styling doll head.

This styling head gift set comes with everything your little one needs to practice hair styling with Jasmine - a mini-doll head and a matching hair brush. Both of the accessories included are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision. Pretend play and dress up encourages creativity and imagination while also offering an excellent opportunity to develop fine motor skills.

With this mini-styling head doll, your child will be learning and practicing new hairstyles like curling, braiding, buns, and updos in no time, just like Mom. This is a must-have princess gift for your child and Jasmine fan. Search Terms: girls styling hair bust dresser doll sitting standing dress up pretend play christmas gift stylist brush disney princess dress classic toy doll Features: - GIRL'S DOLL STYLING SET - Officially licensed by Disney, the Aladdin styling head set features a mini-Jasmine head doll for girls to practice hair styling routines - HAIR BRUSH INCLUDED - Jasmine hair styling gift set comes with a matching hair brush for young girls to practice brushing techniques and keep the doll's hair soft in between play times - SAFE FOR KIDS - All pieces included are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Encourages creativity and imagination during playtime - LEARN TO STYLE HAIR - Dress up styling head set allows young girls to practice different hairstyles on their favorite princess doll like curling, braiding, and updos; Girls can dress up just like Mom! - SPECIFICATIONS - Officially licensed Disney; Character: Jasmine (Aladdin); Pieces included; 2; Material: plastic; Recommended age: girls ages 3+; Doll height: 5.5" tall === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
